messages.text: line 3 says NO LABELS FOUND but there are clearly labels on the web
the label gap sensor isn't seeing the gaps between labels - dirty sensor, wrong sensor mode, or the web isn't seated in the sensor slot
the peel tip sensor window had adhesive gunk on it
clean the sensor eye with IPA, reseat the web in the slot, then teach/calibrate the label sensor so it learns the gap
cleaned, recalibrated the sensor, it's detecting gaps again
